summary_en: ¥135/share (up ¥3 from prior forecast of ¥132/share) for FY3/26 period-end dividend. DOE 3.6% (at floor of mid-term policy), payout ratio 40.4%. Adjustment reflects updated FY3/26 earnings and business environment outlook.
title_en: Notification of Revision to Dividend Forecast (Increase)
translation_en_brief: Wakachiku Construction announced on 14 May 2026 a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026. The period-end dividend per share has been increased by ¥3 to ¥135/share, from the prior forecast of ¥132/share announced on 17 March 2026. The company cited updated FY3/26 earnings results and forward-looking business environment considerations as the rationale for the increase. The revised dividend yields a dividend-on-equity (DOE) of 3.6%, which aligns with the lower bound of the company's mid-term capital allocation policy (FY2024–FY2026), and a payout ratio of 40.4% on a standalone basis, meeting the policy threshold of 40% or higher. The Board of Directors is scheduled to formally approve the dividend on 26 May 2026.
